title: User Authentication and Login
description: Login, logout, session creation, token validation, and CSRF protection for the Puter platform

actors.name: UnauthenticatedUser
actors.description: Guest browser client with no session

actors.name: AuthenticatedUser
actors.description: Browser client holding a valid session token (HttpOnly cookie)

actors.name: APIClient
actors.description: External client using Bearer token or access token

actors.name: OIDCProvider
actors.description: External identity provider (e.g. Google) for OIDC revalidation

actors.name: System
actors.description: Internal backend services: AuthService, SessionService, TokenService

use_cases.name: Authenticate via Token
use_cases.description: Submit auth token (body auth_token, Authorization Bearer header, or cookie) to gain access

use_cases.name: Validate Session Token
use_cases.description: Decode JWT, retrieve session from SessionService, fetch user by uuid
use_cases.result: Returns UserActorType actor with hasHttpOnlyCookie flag

use_cases.name: Get CSRF Token
use_cases.description: Authenticated user requests a new anti-CSRF token for state-changing operations
use_cases.constraint: Blocked on api. subdomain (relaxed CORS); requires req.user
use_cases.implementation: create_token stores token in CircularQueue(10) keyed by session/user uuid; token = crypto.randomBytes(32).hex()

use_cases.name: Consume / Validate CSRF Token
use_cases.description: Validate and one-time-consume a CSRF token before processing a state-changing request

use_cases.name: Request CSRF Token (Frontend)
use_cases.description: Frontend GUI calls /get-anticsrf-token with Bearer token

use_cases.name: Access User-Protected Endpoint
use_cases.description: Access /user-protected/* routes gated by full session + password or OIDC revalidation
middleware_chain: Actor type check: must be UserActorType with hasHttpOnlyCookie=true
Temporary account check (password===null && email===null → blocked except delete-own-user)
Identity revalidation: bcrypt.compare(password, user.password) OR jwt.verify(puter_revalidation cookie)

use_cases.name: Change Password
use_cases.description: Protected endpoint to change account password

use_cases.name: Change Email
use_cases.description: Protected endpoint to change account email

use_cases.name: Disable 2FA
use_cases.description: Protected endpoint to disable two-factor authentication

use_cases.name: Delete Own Account
use_cases.description: Protected endpoint to delete own user account; allows temporary accounts

use_cases.name: OIDC Revalidation
use_cases.description: For OIDC-only accounts (no password), revalidate identity via external provider
use_cases.result: Sets puter_revalidation JWT cookie (purpose='revalidate', user_id) verified by jwt.verify(cookie, config.jwt_secret)

use_cases.name: Handle API Error Response
use_cases.description: Standardized error creation and HTTP response writing

key_relationships: AntiCSRFService (frontend) extends Service — wraps /get-anticsrf-token HTTP call
APIErrorService extends BaseService — wraps APIError.codes for dynamic registration
UserProtectedEndpointsService depends_on APIError, configurable_auth, UserActorType, OIDCService
UserProtectedEndpointsService mounts at /user-protected on web-server app
AntiCSRFService mounts at /get-anticsrf-token on web-server app
AntiCSRFService uses CircularQueue(capacity=10) per session for token storage
include_extend_relationships: UC04 <<includes>> UC03 (token must exist to consume)
important_notes: Token extraction order in configurable_auth: body.auth_token > Authorization header (Bearer) > cookie (config.cookie_name)
UserProtectedEndpointsService blocks api. subdomain cookies via UserActorType.hasHttpOnlyCookie check
CSRF CircularQueue holds last 10 tokens per session; oldest evicted on overflow
Revalidation cookie name: 'puter_revalidation'; verified with config.jwt_secret
Temporary accounts (password===null, email===null) allowed only for delete-own-user
OIDC-only accounts (password===null, email set) cannot use password revalidation; must use OIDC
